context: Checkpoint 2026-06-28. Vault-seed-ready remains dry-run validated; Silo token output is now provider-neutral while preserving Refarm storage fallback.
current_tasks: Commit ff49cf9a makes @refarm.dev/silo resolve/provision provider-native GITHUB_TOKEN and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN keys instead of Refarm-prefixed token keys.
SILO_HOME is now the preferred Silo storage override; REFARM_HOME remains a storage fallback for existing Refarm operators so model Silo OAuth continues to resolve.
Validated pnpm -C packages/silo run test, pnpm -C packages/silo run build, git diff --check, and refarm agent finish after-edit/after-commit for the Silo naming slice.
Manual low-resource turbo warmup used concurrency=1 before after-edit to avoid repeating container pressure; final after-commit passed with apps/refarm and packages/silo validation.
next_actions: Continue naming audit before publication with DS class/theme prefixes next, or update release readiness docs/checklist if naming churn should pause.

Do not repeat pnpm run release:vault-seed:check unless package metadata, files, exports, or release policy changes; latest 10-package dry-run already passed for the current lane before this Silo API change.
For stale runtime-agent sessions after container restart, avoid repeated sessions list retries if it destabilizes runtime; treat it as operator-state cleanup separate from package work.
key_decisions_active: DEC-031: host unificado refarm com renderers TUI/Web/headless sobre contratos compartilhados.
DEC-032: produto CLI/host em apps/; packages/ guardam blocos reutilizáveis.
DEC-034: artefatos WASM Rust devem ser copiados para dist/ durante build.
DEC-035: provision para, configure ainda não existe — silo é o ponto de integração.
DEC-036 [DECIDED]: refarm chat é cliente HTTP do sidecar farmhand em :42001. Não embeda farmhand.
ADR-064 [ACCEPTED]: TokenAuthError com provider + reason + rotationUrl — produzido na camada de credenciais, renderizado por qualquer superfície.
ADR-065 [ACCEPTED]: Farmhand transparent lifecycle — refarm é o single entry point. Auto-start com Y/n confirm, detached spawn, 300ms poll. LaunchDeps interface para testabilidade.
